You are reviewing a PR for a test management system.

Checklist:
- No invented numeric expectations. Expected numeric values must be traced to SpecRule or ProjectConfig.
- Parsers: Excel merge-cells expansion and Word mapping table extraction are tested.
- Every new/modified Requirement/SpecRule/TestCase includes References.
- Quality gates updated if generation logic changed.
- CI passes and new tests added.

Return:
- Summary (3-6 bullets)
- High risk issues
- Suggested patches (if small)
